title: Nursery Rhyme. DXLIV. Natural History.
content:
I had two pigeons bright and gay,
        They flew from me the other day;
        What was the reason they did go?
        I cannot tell for I do not know.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. DXLIV. Natural History."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
